codeReview.summary: Created comprehensive test suite for InputError component with 13 tests covering all component functionality: message rendering, conditional rendering (null for undefined/empty), default CSS classes, custom className support, HTML attribute passthrough, and edge cases.

summary: InputError component tests review PASS. 13 tests created and verified passing. Test coverage includes: message rendering, paragraph element output, null/undefined/empty message handling, default CSS classes (text-red-600, text-sm, dark:text-red-400), custom className support, HTML attribute passthrough (id, data-testid), long messages, special characters, and multiple component rendering.
